subcodes.first_line: O thou whose countenance hath shone forth from the horizon of steadfastness and firmness in the Covenant of God, blessed art thou in this chalice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اضاء وجهه من افق الثبوت و الرسوخ علی میثاق الله هنیئا لک هذه الکاس
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the concourse on high, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
